name: English
home.desc: The most powerful Telegram & Discord bot for Whiteout Survival. Auto gift codes, alliance tracking, interactive maps, calculators and more.
home.features_desc: Packed with powerful tools to manage your alliance efficiently across both Telegram and Discord.
home.codes_desc: Use our web-based gift code redemption tool. No login required — just enter your player ID and redeem all active codes with one click.
home.dual_desc: One bot, two games. Full feature parity across both titles with shared alliance management.
home.wos_desc: Post-apocalyptic survival with real-time alliance battles. Full support for gift codes, tracking, maps, and events.
home.ks_desc: Strategic kingdom builder with alliance warfare. Same powerful features, optimized for Kingshot mechanics.
home.platforms_desc: Cross-platform sync. Register on Telegram, see your data on Discord — and vice versa.
home.cta_desc: Join hundreds of alliances already using WOS Control. Free to start, premium plans available.
feat.auto_codes_desc: Automatically detects and redeems gift codes for all alliance members. ONNX ML captcha solver with 98% accuracy.
feat.tracking_desc: Monitor furnace levels, nickname changes, state transfers. Real-time alerts on Discord and Telegram.
feat.maps_desc: Plan bear trap layouts, place HQ, flags and members. Auto-hive generation with square formation.
feat.calc_desc: Troop training, chief gear, charms, hero gear calculators. Plan your upgrades precisely.
feat.events_desc: Bear trap, canyon clash, crazy joe reminders with hero recommendations. Never miss an event.
feat.wiki_desc: Auto-monitors wiki for new items, events and transfer schedules. AI-powered translations.
feat.premium_desc: Flexible subscription plans with Stripe integration. Scale from 200 to unlimited members.
feat.multi_lang_desc: Full support for English, Turkish and Russian. Each group gets its own language setting.
features.desc: From automatic gift codes to interactive map planning — discover everything WOS Control can do.
features.gc_auto_detect_desc: Monitors multiple sources for new WOS and Kingshot gift codes automatically
features.gc_bulk_desc: Redeems codes for all alliance members with concurrent processing (10 parallel)
features.gc_captcha_desc: Local ML-based captcha solving with 98% accuracy in under 5ms
features.gc_fallback_desc: XEvil local + sctg.xyz cloud fallback chain for 100% reliability
features.gc_retry_desc: Failed codes automatically retried, already-used codes tracked per member
features.gc_progress_desc: Real-time progress updates: SUCCESS/FAILED/ALREADY_USED per member
features.am_tracking_desc: Monitor furnace level changes, nickname changes, state transfers in real-time
features.am_register_desc: Members register via /register or ID channel — DM confirmation flow
features.am_bulk_desc: /bulkadd and /bulkremove for managing large alliances quickly
features.am_profile_desc: Detailed /profile with avatar, power, gift code stats, change history
features.am_settings_desc: Per-alliance settings: language, notification channels, admin roles
features.am_multi_desc: Support multiple alliances per group with separate tracking
features.mp_editor_desc: Full-featured web editor with pan, zoom, drag-and-drop member placement
features.mp_buildings_desc: HQ (3×3), Bear Trap (3×3), Farm (3×3), Mine (2×2), City (2×2), Flag (1×1)
features.mp_hive_desc: One-click hive generation: flags around traps, members in square rings
features.mp_coords_desc: Real game coordinates (X:361 Y:538) — maps center on your actual location
features.mp_export_desc: /mapimage sends PNG with coordinates, member names, building labels
features.calc_troops_desc: Training and promotion costs for T1-T11 troops
features.calc_gear_desc: Upgrade calculator: Green to Pink, 0-5 stars with material costs
features.calc_charms_desc: Charm upgrade costs from Level 0 to Level 16
features.calc_joe_desc: Difficulty recommendation based on alliance average furnace level
features.calc_transfer_desc: Kingdom transfer cost estimation with pass requirements
features.ev_bear_desc: Beautiful notifications with hero recommendations (P2W/F2P), march times
features.ev_canyon_desc: Event reminders with rally formation tips
features.ev_joe_desc: Difficulty recommendation with wave-by-wave guide and point calculator
features.ev_custom_desc: Create custom event reminders with timezone support and repeat schedules
features.ev_cross_desc: Notifications sent to both Telegram groups and Discord channels
features.tw_schedule_desc: Auto-monitors wiki for new transfer sneak peeks using AI image analysis
features.tw_sheets_desc: Automatically updates transfer schedule in Google Sheets V2
features.tw_affected_desc: Notifies members whose states are included in new transfer dates
features.tw_items_desc: Tracks new game items from wiki with images and descriptions
features.tw_events_desc: Monitors official events and Korean leaks (sneak peeks)
features.tw_ai_desc: OpenAI-powered translation to each group's language
alliances.title: Alliance Directory
alliances.desc: Discover alliances powered by WOS Control Bot. Automatic gift codes, member tracking, and more.
alliances.no_results_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters
alliances.bot_removed_notice: Bot was removed from this group. Auto gift codes are paused.
alliances.bot_no_admin_notice: Bot is not admin. Some features may not work.
alliances.warning: This is a curated selection of alliances using WOS Control Bot. Not all alliances may be listed here. The list is updated periodically and may not reflect real-time data.
alliances.cta_desc: Add WOS Control Bot to your Telegram or Discord group and register your alliance.
yt.title: Our YouTubers
yt.desc: These amazing content creators support WOS Control and help our community grow. They create guides, reviews, and gameplay content for Whiteout Survival & Kingshot.
yt.none_hint: Be the first to apply below!
yt.apply_desc: Are you a YouTube content creator for Whiteout Survival or Kingshot? Partner with us and get featured on our platform!
yt.benefit_featured_desc: Your channel displayed on our site with thousands of visitors
yt.benefit_grow_desc: Reach WOS & Kingshot players from our active community
yt.benefit_access_desc: Early access to new bot features and premium perks
yt.req1: Create a video or dedicated content featuring WOS Control Bot and our website woscontrol.com
yt.req2: Your channel must be focused on Whiteout Survival or Kingshot content
yt.req3: Include a link to woscontrol.com and our Telegram bot @WhiteoutGuildBot in your video description
yt.req4: Show how the bot works — gift code redemption, alliance management, or any feature you like
yt.about_placeholder: What content do you create? Why do you want to partner with WOS Control?
yt.disclaimer: By submitting, you agree that your channel information may be displayed on our website. We review applications within 24-48 hours.
codes.hero_desc: Enter your player ID, select codes and redeem instantly. No login required.
codes.no_players: Add a player to start redeeming
codes.code_limit_reached_desc: This code has reached its maximum usage limit and can no longer be redeemed.
profile.title: Profile
profile.login_desc: Login to view your profile and redemption history.
maps.desc: Plan your bear trap layouts, place HQ, flags and members with our interactive web editor. Used by top alliances worldwide.
maps.step1_desc: Use /mapsetup in Telegram. Choose grid size and set your center coordinates.
maps.step2_desc: Add HQ, Bear Traps, Flags using buttons or /place command with game coordinates.
maps.step3_desc: Auto Hive places all members in square formation around traps. Or drag & drop in web editor.
maps.step4_desc: Get map image with /mapimage or share viewer link with /mapshare. Everyone sees the plan.
maps.alliance_maps_desc: Live maps from alliances using WOS Control
maps.no_maps_hint: Create your first map with /mapsetup in Telegram
transfer.desc: Everything you need to know about kingdom transfers in Whiteout Survival. WOS Control tracks schedules and notifies affected members automatically.
transfer.req1: Must not exceed the Power Cap for your state group
transfer.req2: Must reach required Furnace level (varies with state age)
transfer.req3: Must NOT be in any Alliance during transfer
transfer.req4: City must not be in combat
transfer.req6: Target state must have same Hero Gen and FC level
transfer.req7: Fewer than 4 characters in target state
transfer.phase1_desc: Power caps are set. Prepare your resources and plan your move.
transfer.phase2_desc: Alliance president sends transfer invites to specific players.
transfer.phase3_desc: Anyone meeting requirements can transfer freely.
transfer.bot_desc: WOS Control automatically monitors transfer schedules and notifies affected alliance members with exact dates and power caps.
transfer.found_windows: Found {count} upcoming transfer window(s) for State #{state}
transfer.no_windows: No upcoming transfer windows found for State #{state}.
transfer.no_windows_hint: Data is community-contributed — help us add your state!
transfer.upcoming_desc: Live data from community contributors. Use the state search above to find your specific windows.
transfer.power_desc: Power caps by Hero Generation and Furnace level at transfer time.
transfer.no_power_data: Power limit data not yet loaded.
transfer.contribute_desc: Transfer dates are community-contributed. Know your state's transfer schedule?
transfer.contribute_reward: Your name will appear in every /transfer message
transfer.group_blur_hint: State group ranges are visible to contributors and owners only.
transfer.not_in_schedule: Not in any current transfer group
transfer.coverage_up_to: Schedule currently covers up to State {state}
transfer.rate_limited: Rate limit exceeded. Try again later.
transfer.admin.title: Transfer Manager
transfer.admin.subtitle: Manage transfer schedules, power limits & contributor access
transfer.admin.unauthorized_desc: You don't have permission to access the Transfer Manager. Contact the site owner to request access.
transfer.admin.login_desc: Sign in with Discord or Telegram to access the Transfer Manager.
transfer.admin.no_schedule_hint: Import from Google Sheets or add manually.
transfer.admin.no_power: No power limits yet. Import from Sheets or add manually.
transfer.admin.contributor_desc: Contributors can add, edit and delete transfer dates and power limits. Enter the username of a registered website user.
transfer.admin.search_placeholder: Search by username, ID, or nickname...
calc.desc: Precise calculators for troops, gear, charms and hero equipment. Never waste resources again.
calc.how_desc: Send /calc in Telegram or Discord. Choose your calculator from the interactive button menu. Results are instant.
calc.troop_desc: Calculate training and promotion costs for T1 through T11 troops. Plan your army composition efficiently.
calc.gear_desc: Plan chief gear upgrades from Green to Pink quality, 0 to 5 stars. See exact material and resource costs.
calc.charm_desc: Calculate charm upgrade costs from Level 0 to Level 16. Plan your charm progression path.
calc.hero_desc: Hero gear enhancement (0-100) and mastery forging (0-10). Plan your hero equipment progression.
calc.war_academy_desc: Plan your T11 Helios troop research. Calculate Fire Crystal Shards needed for Infantry, Lancer, and Marksman branches.
wa_calc.subtitle: Plan your path to T11 Helios troops. Set current research levels and calculate exact Fire Crystal Shards needed.
wa_calc.ready_sub: You have enough FCS to unlock Helios.
pet_calc.desc: Calculate the exact food, manuals, potions and serums needed to level up your pets.
pet_calc.food_info: Food costs double every 10 levels (100→200→400→... per level). Advancement items required at every 10-level milestone: Taming Manual (always), Energizing Potion (Lv.30+), Strengthening Serum (Lv.50+). Data based on community research.
expert_calc.title: Dawn Academy
expert_calc.desc: Plan your Expert relationship levels and skill upgrades. Calculate affinity gifts, sigils, Books of Knowledge, and SvS Day 2 point value.
expert_calc.svs_tip: Expert Sigils = 6,000 pts each on SvS Day 2. Save them and use during State vs. State for maximum point gains. Romulus requires 1,820 sigils to max — focus Agnes & Cyrille first (275 each).
expert_calc.data_note: Affinity and book costs are based on community data. Data may vary slightly by server version.
expert_calc.talent_desc.cyrille: Increases Bear Hunt Damage Points by up to 30% (affects self only). Automatically grows with Relationship Level.
expert_calc.talent_desc.agnes: Grants 5 Seeker Chests every 120 minutes of gathering. Boosts resource collection and gathering efficiency.
expert_calc.talent_desc.holger: 100% chance of obtaining 3 Arena Star Chests per battle. Significantly increases all hero stats in Arena combat.
expert_calc.talent_desc.romulus: Increases Expedition Army size by up to 10,000. Enhances overall military strength and rally capacity.
expert_calc.talent_desc.baldur: Reduces Alliance Shop prices by 15% and doubles Activity Chest rewards. Core talent for alliance events.
expert_calc.talent_desc.fabian: Increases Attack and Defense by 30% during Foundry Battle. Maximizes Foundry event performance.
expert_calc.talent_desc.valeria: Increases Attack and Defense by 30% during SvS Battle Phase. Essential for maximizing SvS points.
expert_calc.talent_desc.ronne: Increases Attack and Defense by 30% when raiding or being raided. Protects cargo and maximizes trade route efficiency.
expert_calc.stat_approx_note: Stat values are approximate based on wiki & community data. Verify exact values on the wiki.
pet_skill.builders_aide_desc: Increases Construction Speed by the given % for 5 minutes.
pet_skill.arctic_embrace_desc: Instantly restores Chief Stamina by the given amount.
pet_skill.burden_bearer_desc: Instantly completes gathering upon reaching the next wilderness tile.
pet_skill.natural_intuition_desc: Instantly locates the given amount of Pet Food.
pet_skill.razorbeak_desc: Reduces enemy troop Health by the given % for 2 hours.
pet_skill.mystical_finding_desc: Unearths a lost item on the Tundra. Cooldown reduces as skill levels up.
pet_skill.lightning_raid_desc: Increases March Speed and reduces enemy Troop Lethality for 2 hours.
pet_skill.feral_anthem_desc: Increases all troops' Attack by the given % for 2 hours.
pet_skill.tumbling_power_desc: Increases Squad Capacity by the given amount for 2 hours.
pet_skill.rallying_beasts_desc: Increases Rally Capacity by the given amount for 2 hours.
pet_skill.apex_assault_desc: Increases Troops Lethality by the given % for 2 hours.
pet_skill.hardened_skin_desc: Increases Troops Defense by the given % for 2 hours.
pet_skill.earthbound_vigor_desc: Reduces enemy Troops' Defense by the given % for 2 hours.
wiki.desc: Learn how to use every feature of WOS Control
wiki.getting_started_desc: Set up WOS Control for your alliance in under 5 minutes.
wiki.commands_desc: Complete reference for every WOS Control command.
footer.desc: The ultimate alliance management bot for Whiteout Survival. Trusted by hundreds of alliances worldwide.
footer.copyright: WOS Control. Not affiliated with Century Games.
privacy.hero_subtitle: This document describes how WOS Control collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal data when you use our Telegram bot, Discord bot, or website.
privacy.summary_1: We collect your game player ID (FID), Telegram/Discord user ID, and basic game stats to power bot features.
privacy.summary_2: We never sell, rent, or share your data with advertisers or data brokers.
privacy.summary_3: Cookies are used only for login sessions and UI preferences — no tracking cookies.
privacy.summary_4: You can request full data export or deletion at any time.
privacy.summary_5: This service is not affiliated with Century Games, Elex Technology, Discord Inc., or Telegram Messenger.
privacy.no_sell: WOS Control never sells, rents, or trades your personal data to third parties for commercial or advertising purposes.
privacy.contact_desc: For any privacy-related requests — including data access, correction, deletion, or general questions — please reach out. We aim to respond within 5 business days.
privacy.lang_note: The English version of this policy is the legally binding version.
privacy.footer_note: Not affiliated with Century Games, Elex Technology, or any official Whiteout Survival / Kingshot entity.
api.title: WOS Control API
api.subtitle: Access gift codes, player data, and redeem codes programmatically. Build bots, websites, and tools on top of the WOS Control platform.
api.auth_desc: Most endpoints require an API key. Pass it via one of these methods:
api.rate_premium: Higher limits available with premium API packages.
api.errors_desc: All errors return a JSON object with an error field:
api.err_403: API key banned or domain banned
api.demo_desc: Try these examples to see full API responses:
api.packages_desc: Choose a plan that fits your project. Upgrade anytime.
api.get_key_desc: Login with Telegram or Discord to get instant API access. Your identity is verified automatically.
api.get_key_login_desc: You must login with Telegram or Discord to get an API key. This helps us verify your identity and prevent abuse.
api.get_key_limit: You can request up to 2 API keys per day.
api.get_key_save_warning: Save this key now! It cannot be recovered. If lost, you'll need to register a new one.
api.leaderboard_desc: Top API consumers ranked by total requests
api.leaderboard_empty: No API usage yet. Be the first!
api.cta_desc: Login with Telegram or Discord to get your API key instantly.
api.redeem_note: Redeem operations are async. Submit a request, then poll the status endpoint.
api.perf_subtitle: Real-time monitoring of all API endpoints
api.perf_no_data: No API usage data yet. Start making requests!
api.perf_footer: Data refreshes on page load. Performance metrics are calculated from the last 30 days of API usage.
api.perf_p99_explain: 99th percentile (99% of requests are faster than this value)
api.perf_bar_explain: Each bar = 1 day of the last 30 days
api.pkg_custom_desc: Need custom limits per endpoint? Want higher quotas for specific APIs? Contact us for a tailored package.
api.key_already_have: You already have an API key. Only 1 key per account is allowed. Contact support if you need a replacement.
api.key_desc_placeholder: How will you use the API? What does your project do?
api.key_one_per_account: Only 1 API key per account. Your key will be generated instantly.
api.cpb_subtitle: Drag the sliders to set your ideal limits per endpoint
api.cpb_success: Custom package request submitted! We will contact you soon.
admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: API System Management
admin.login_desc: Login with the owner Telegram or Discord account to access the admin panel.
admin.cpb_pricing_desc: Pricing per extra unit above free tier ($/unit/month)
admin.multi_lang_hint: Write content in multiple languages at once
admin.confirm_delete_ann: Delete this announcement? This cannot be undone.
admin.required_one_lang: At least one language with title and content is required
admin.drop_image: Drop image here or click to upload
admin.key_desc_placeholder: Describe what this API key is used for...
wiki.cmd_start: Start the bot and see welcome message
wiki.cmd_register: Register your game account (auto gift code redemption)
wiki.cmd_profile: View detailed player profile with stats
wiki.cmd_addmember: Add a member to alliance by FID
wiki.cmd_checkuser: Look up any player by their FID
wiki.cmd_codes: View all active gift codes and their status
wiki.cmd_usecode: Redeem a gift code for all alliance members
wiki.cmd_addcode: Manually add a gift code to the system
wiki.cmd_mapsetup: Map manager — create maps, auto-hive, manage buildings
wiki.cmd_place: Place building on map (HQ, TRAP, FLAG, etc.)
wiki.cmd_placemember: Place a member on the map by name or FID
wiki.cmd_mapimage: Get current map as PNG image
wiki.cmd_calc: Interactive calculator menu (troops, gear, charms, hero gear)
wiki.cmd_events: View all scheduled events for your alliance
wiki.cmd_addevent: Add a new event reminder with timezone support
wiki.cmd_transfer: View transfer info for a kingdom (dates, power limits, costs)
wiki.cmd_state: View server timeline and upcoming events
wiki.cmd_premium: View subscription plan, usage, and upgrade options
wiki.cmd_changelog: View bot version and recent updates
maps.cmd_placemember: Place member by name or FID
wiki.events_desc: Never miss an alliance event. Beautiful reminders with hero recommendations.
wiki.gc_desc: Automatic gift code detection and bulk redemption for your entire alliance.
wiki.gc_step1_desc: Bot monitors game wiki for new gift codes every 5 minutes.
wiki.gc_step2_desc: ONNX ML model solves captchas locally with 98% accuracy in under 5ms. Fallback to cloud providers if needed.
wiki.gc_step3_desc: Codes are redeemed for all alliance members simultaneously with real-time progress tracking.
wiki.gc_step4_desc: Each member's status is tracked: SUCCESS, ALREADY_USED, FAILED. Never wastes API calls on already-redeemed codes.
wiki.gc_cmd_codes: View all active gift codes with status (validated/pending/expired)
wiki.gc_cmd_usecode: Redeem a gift code for all alliance members
wiki.gc_cmd_addcode: Add a code manually (if auto-detection missed it)
wiki.cmd_setup: Interactive setup wizard for new groups
wiki.cmd_setgroup: Link current group to an alliance
wiki.cmd_history: View player change history (name, furnace, state)
wiki.cmd_setcoord: Set your own position on the map
wiki.cmd_hero: Hero guide, tier list, and search
wiki.cmd_crazyjoe: Crazy Joe event guide with difficulty recommendation
wiki.cmd_startcontrol: Start alliance tracking (furnace, nickname, state changes)
wiki.cmd_settings: View current bot settings for this group
wiki.cmd_setlogchannel: Set log channel for detailed activity
wiki.cmd_inactive: Show inactive members (no activity in X days)
wiki.cmd_admins: Manage bot admins for your alliance
wiki.cmd_github: Connect GitHub account for bonus registration limits
wiki.cmd_addform: Add Google Form for auto-submit on registration
wiki.calc_wiki_desc: Plan your upgrades precisely with interactive calculators.
wiki.gs_tg3: Add the bot to your alliance group
wiki.gs_tg4: Make the bot an admin (for notifications)
wiki.gs_dc1: Use the Discord invite link to add the bot
wiki.gs_dc2: Grant necessary permissions (Send Messages, Embed Links)
wiki.gs_dc3: Link your Discord server with /getlinkcode in Telegram
wiki.gs_dc4: Use the link code in Discord to connect
wiki.gs_setup2: Choose your game: Whiteout Survival or Kingshot
wiki.gs_setup3: Enter your alliance tag (e.g. NAR, WHT)
wiki.gs_reg3: Bot verifies via game API and confirms
wiki.gs_reg4: Or use /addmember FID to add members manually
wiki.gs_reg5: Use /bulkadd for adding many members at once
codes.hero_full_desc: Enter your Player ID, and we'll automatically redeem all active gift codes for your account. Free, fast, and secure.
codes.login_to_redeem_desc: Sign in to save your players and redeem gift codes automatically. Your data will be stored securely.
codes.how_1: Add your Player ID (FID) from game settings
codes.how_2: Click "Redeem All" — job is queued on our server
codes.how_3: Our bot processes each code with automatic captcha solving
codes.how_4: Track live progress — you can close the page and come back
codes.api_banner_desc: Access codes programmatically. Build bots & tools with our free API.
profile.no_alliance: No alliance linked. Register with the bot to see alliance info.
alliances.join_login_required: You need to login to join this group.
alliances.join_desc: Send a join request, the bot will send you an invite link via DM.
alliances.join_bot_dm: Bot will send you an invite link via DM
alliances.join_banned: You are banned from this alliance
alliances.join_banned_desc: You have been removed from this alliance and cannot apply again.
alliances.join_already_member_desc: You are already registered as a member of this alliance.
alliances.join_rate_limited_desc: You have already applied to this alliance recently. Please wait 12 hours before applying again.
alliances.login_match_platform: Login with the account matching the group's platform
yt.feature_how_desc: YouTubers who publish a video containing woscontrol or woscontrol.com in the last 7 days are automatically promoted to ⭐ Featured!
yt.feature_rule1: Video title or description must contain woscontrol
yt.feature_rule3: Featured YouTubers are shown at the top of the page
yt.feature_rule4: Bot sends you a thank you message via Telegram/Discord
heroes.desc: Complete Whiteout Survival hero guide. Browse all heroes by generation, type, and tier. Find the best heroes for your team.
heroes.no_results_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters
heroes.bt_tip1: Always use your highest generation heroes for rallies
heroes.bt_tip2: Garrison heroes should prioritize defense stats
heroes.bt_no_hero_tip: If you don't have the correct heroes, send troops with NO heroes. It's better to send no heroes than wrong heroes.
heroes.cta_desc: Use /hero command in Telegram or Discord for interactive hero search with filters.
ann.desc: Official in-game announcements from Whiteout Survival and Kingshot. Stay updated with the latest events, updates and news.
ann.no_results_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters
ann.cta_desc: Add WOS Control Bot to your Telegram or Discord group to receive announcements automatically in your language.
ps.desc: Look up any Whiteout Survival or Kingshot player by their FID. View furnace level, nickname history, gift code usage and more.
ps.not_found_hint: Check the FID and game type, then try again
ps.cta_desc: Use /checkuser command in Telegram or Discord for detailed player lookups.
dash.desc: View your alliance stats, member list, gift code history and more.
dash.login_desc: Sign in with Telegram or Discord to access your alliance dashboard.
dash.no_alliance_desc: You don't have an alliance linked to your account. Register through the bot first.
dash.cta_desc: Use /alliance command in the bot for full alliance management features.
submit_code.title: Submit a Gift Code
submit_code.desc: Found a new Whiteout Survival gift code? Submit it here and help the community!
submit_code.desc2: We'll verify the code automatically and add it to our database if valid.
submit_code.rule1_desc: Submit gift codes only. Player IDs and random text will be rejected.
submit_code.rule2_desc: Submitted codes are automatically tested and verified by our bot.
submit_code.rule3_desc: Valid code submissions help thousands of players. Thank you!
submit_code.msg_success: Code submitted! We will verify it shortly. If valid, it will appear on the Codes page.
submit_code.msg_player_id: This looks like a Player ID, not a gift code.
submit_code.msg_invalid_format: Invalid code format. Letters, numbers, and dashes only (6-30 chars).
submit_code.msg_already_known: This code is already in our database! Check the Codes page.
submit_code.msg_already_submitted: This code has already been submitted.
submit_code.msg_rate_limited: Too many submissions. Please wait before submitting more.
submit_code.msg_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
alliances.join_success: Join request sent! The bot will invite you to [{tag}] {name} via {platform}.
alliances.cross_platform_removed: ⚠️ This user was previously removed from this alliance on another platform.
alliances.cross_platform_removed_desc: You were removed from this alliance on another platform. The alliance leaders will be notified if you apply again.
alliances.cross_platform_warning: Warning: This user was previously removed from this alliance via {platform}.
alliances.join_error_server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
announcements.not_found_desc: The announcement you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
rec.hero_desc: The #1 marketplace for Whiteout Survival & Kingshot. Connect alliances with players, plan your next state transfer.
rec.alliance_desc: Looking for players to join your ranks? Post your recruitment listing and reach thousands of active players.
rec.player_desc: Looking for the right alliance or planning a state transfer? Create your profile and get discovered.
rec.step1_desc: Alliance leaders post requirements & benefits. Players upload screenshots — our AI extracts your stats automatically.
rec.step2_desc: Filter by power, kingdom, language, play style. Check transfer compatibility between states instantly.
rec.step3_desc: Apply to alliances or send invites. Manage everything from a single dashboard. Get notified via Telegram or Discord.
rec.ai_desc: No manual data entry needed. Simply upload your in-game screenshots and our GPT-4 Vision AI will automatically extract your stats.
rec.ai_power_desc: Total power, hero power, gear power, pets, experts
rec.transfer_knowledge_desc: Learn about transfer phases, power caps, pass costs, and requirements. Our bot tracks transfer windows automatically.
rec.no_alliances_hint: Try adjusting your filters or be the first to post a listing.
rec.no_players_hint: Adjust filters or create the first player profile.
rec.ai_screenshot_desc: Upload a game screenshot and our AI will automatically extract your stats.
rec.fid_hint: Your stats (name, furnace, kingdom) will be auto-filled from game API
rec.power_stats_hint: Upload a screenshot above to auto-fill, or enter manually.
rec.looking_for_hint: Describe what kind of alliance/state you're looking for...
rec.manage_desc: Review applications, accept or reject candidates.
rec.no_apps_hint: Share your listing to start receiving applications.
rec.compat_desc: Check if you can transfer between two states based on power caps, hero generation, and furnace era.
rec.compatible_desc: You can transfer from S#{from} to S#{to}
rec.power_too_high_desc: States are compatible but your power exceeds the cap. You'll need a Special Invite.
rec.not_compatible_desc: These states are in different transfer groups or have mismatched hero generation / furnace era.
rec.cost_note: Rough estimate: ~1 pass per 20M power. Actual cost depends on your Transfer Score vs target state's Transfer Rating.
rec.invalid_kingdom: Invalid kingdom number. Please enter valid state numbers.
rec.example_desc: Here are examples of the screenshots our AI can analyze. Take a screenshot of these screens in your game:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s3_1_title: 3.1 We Do Not Sell Your Data
privacy.s1_1_body: When you register with our bot or use our website, we collect the following data from the official game API:
privacy.s1_2_intro: When you interact with our Telegram or Discord bot, we store your platform account ID:
privacy.s1_2_note: We do not store your phone number, email address, or any other personal contact info from Telegram or Discord.
privacy.s1_3_body: We log bot command interactions, gift code redemptions, API requests, and feature usage events. This data is stored in aggregate for service improvement and fair-use enforcement. Individual command logs are retained for 90 days.
privacy.s1_4_body: Content you voluntarily provide — such as recruitment listings, alliance descriptions, screenshots uploaded for AI analysis, or Google Form submissions — is stored and may be displayed publicly on the platform. You consent to this when you submit the content.
privacy.s1_5_body: When you use our website, our server may log your IP address, browser type, and referrer URL for security and debugging purposes. These logs are retained for a maximum of 30 days and are not linked to your account.
privacy.s2_1_body: Your FID and game data power the following features: automatic gift code redemption, alliance member tracking, transfer power calculations, state timeline management, bear trap notifications, hero leaderboards, and recruitment marketplace. Without this data, these features cannot function.
privacy.s2_2_body: Alliance administrators you are registered under can view your nickname, FID, furnace level, and gift code redemption history within their alliance dashboard. They cannot access your Telegram or Discord user IDs.
privacy.s2_3_body: We use your Telegram and/or Discord user ID to send you bot replies, gift code confirmations, event notifications (if enabled), and important account alerts. You can opt out of non-essential notifications at any time using bot commands.
privacy.s2_4_body: Your in-game nickname and game stats may appear on public leaderboards, alliance pages, or recruitment listings if you have created a public profile or been added to an alliance. You can request removal at any time.
privacy.s2_5_body: We analyse aggregated, anonymised usage patterns to improve bot commands, website performance, and server stability. No individual profiling or automated decision-making is applied to your personal data.
privacy.s2_6_body: We process your data under the following legal bases: (a) Contractual necessity — to provide the services you have signed up for; (b) Legitimate interests — to improve and secure our services; (c) Consent — for any marketing or optional communications.
privacy.s3_2_intro: We share minimum necessary data with the following integrated services:
privacy.s3_3_body: We may disclose personal data if required by applicable law, court order, or government request. We will notify affected users where legally permitted. We will challenge requests we believe are overbroad or unlawful.
privacy.s3_4_body: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, user data may be transferred to the new entity. You will be notified via bot message before the transfer takes place, and you will have the option to delete your account.
privacy.s4_3_body: You may disable cookies via your browser settings. Disabling session cookies will prevent you from using authenticated features. Functional localStorage items can be cleared through your browser's developer tools.
privacy.s5_2_body: When you request account deletion, all personally identifiable data is removed within 30 days. Aggregated, anonymised data may be retained indefinitely. Alliance gift code logs referencing your actions are also anonymised.
privacy.s6_2_body: In the event of a confirmed data breach that puts your personal data at risk, we will notify affected users via Telegram/Discord bot message and relevant supervisory authorities within 72 hours of becoming aware of the breach.
privacy.s7_2_body: To exercise any of the above rights, contact us via the Telegram bot (@WhiteoutGuildBot) or the support chat on our website. We will verify your identity before processing the request. All requests will be fulfilled within 30 calendar days.
privacy.s7_3_body: If you believe we have handled your data unlawfully, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the relevant data protection supervisory authority in your country of residence.
privacy.s8_dc_body: WOS Control's Discord bot operates under the Discord Developer Policy and Discord Terms of Service. We request only the minimum necessary permissions to function.
privacy.s8_tg_body: WOS Control's Telegram bot operates under the Telegram Bot API Terms. Bot interactions are subject to Telegram's privacy policy as the platform operator.
privacy.s8_1_body: Via the Telegram Bot API, our bot can see: your user ID, first name, last name (if set), username (if set), and language code. We store only the user ID and username. First and last names are not stored.
privacy.s8_2_body: Via the Discord Bot API, our bot can see: your user ID, username, discriminator, avatar hash, and the guild IDs of servers where the bot is present. We store only the user ID and username. Guild administrators can remove the bot at any time.
privacy.s9_intro: The following third-party services are integrated into WOS Control. Each operates under its own privacy policy. We encourage you to review them.
privacy.s10_1_body: WOS Control is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided personal data to us, please contact us immediately and we will delete the information within 7 days.
privacy.s10_2_body: The underlying games (Whiteout Survival and Kingshot) have their own age requirements. Users of our bot and website must comply with the age requirements of the respective games and platforms (Telegram: 13+, Discord: 13+).
privacy.s11_1_intro: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will:
privacy.s11_1_item1: Update the "Effective" date shown at the top of this page
privacy.s11_1_item2: Notify all registered users via Telegram and Discord bot message for material changes
privacy.s11_1_item3: Post a changelog notice on this page listing what changed
privacy.s11_2_body: Continued use of WOS Control services after the updated policy takes effect constitutes acceptance of the new policy. If you do not agree with the changes, you may request account deletion before the effective date.
privacy.s6_tls_desc: All data in transit encrypted via HTTPS/TLS 1.3
privacy.s6_db_desc: PostgreSQL hosted within the European Union
privacy.s6_key_desc: API keys stored as hashes — never plain text
privacy.s6_ac_desc: DB access restricted to authorised systems only
privacy.s6_al_desc: Administrative actions are logged and reviewed
privacy.s6_bk_desc: Daily encrypted backups retained for 14 days
